title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.1060 - Food banks, state plan to be submitted for federal project
text:
208.1060.  Food banks, state plan to be submitted for federal project. — The department of social services shall submit a state plan to the U.S. Department of Agriculture for a Farm to Food Bank Project under 7 CFR 251.10(j) and shall contract with any qualified food bank, as defined in 7 CFR 251.3(f), for the purpose of operating the project.
(L. 2021 H.B. 432)
